name: comfyui
description: ComfyUI image/video generation — server management, workflow editing, node/model management.

prerequisites.name: pip
prerequisites.install_hint: Install Python from https://python.org/ or Miniconda from https://docs.conda.io/
prerequisites.note: Only needed for installing comfy-cli software, not for skill files

prerequisites.name: npx
prerequisites.install_hint: Install Node.js from https://nodejs.org/ (npx is bundled with npm)

methods.name: pip
methods.command: pip install comfy-cli || python -m pip install comfy-cli || python3 -m pip install comfy-cli

post_install.name: comfy-pilot
post_install.description: Install comfy-pilot custom node for live workflow editing

post_install.name: mcporter
post_install.description: MCPorter CLI for calling MCP tools from the command line

integration_test.description: ComfyUI server must be running at http://127.0.0.1:8188

COMFYUI_WORKSPACE.prompt: Path to your ComfyUI workspace directory (the folder containing main.py and custom_nodes/)

COMFYUI_PYTHON.prompt: Path to the Python executable used by ComfyUI (embedded or system Python)
